validate.notes: Could not re-run validation: Bash tool unusable in this environment — every invocation fails with `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/home/worker/.claude/session-env'`. The harness cannot create its session-env directory, and writing a placeholder there is blocked as a sensitive path. Without bash I cannot invoke docker build, pytest, or judge.py. Preserving the prior successful validate result (nop=0, gold=1) from the earlier fireworks run on 2026-04-16 (history entry shows verdict=pass). The overall pipeline verdict is fail because fix_quality was rate-limited (see top-level error field), not because validation regressed.

prior_validate_result.notes: Prior run: Fixed rubric rules in eval_manifest.yaml - changed from checking AGENTS.md modifications to checking actual code style in dataloader.py (type hints and total_size calculation). Docker build passes. NOP test correctly returns 0 (5 tests fail as expected). Gold test correctly returns 1 (14 tests pass after patch applied).
